meta.title: DEF CON 29 ICS Village - Tim Yardley -  Beetlejuice The Lessons We Should Have Learned
meta.description: In this talk I will present the top 15 quotes from *redacted* and how we can transform them to operational advice to improve ICS cyber security. Hold tight, this is going to be a wild ride.
